title: Basic Blockchain Key-Value DB
summary: Blockchain-based key-value store with CLI and Docker cluster support.
description: A minimalistic blockchain-backed key-value database that treats every mutation as an append-only block, enabling deterministic state recovery and auditability. With a Go-based engine, a CLI for interaction, and Docker configurations for easy deployment, it’s ideal for learning or lightweight use-cases where immutability and traceability matter.
